about.title: About us
about.p1: We are Kazoom, an online store that brings together everything you need in one place. From housewares to electronics, fitness gear to tools, our mission is to deliver quality products with the best prices and outstanding customer service.
about.p2: We work with the best brands and offer worldwide shipping, with installment options on credit card.
about.p3: Your satisfaction is our commitment. Count on our support Monday–Friday, 8am to 6pm, for any questions or needs. It's Kazoom!

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.s1: By accessing and using the Kazoom website, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, do not use our site.
terms.s2: All prices are shown in the selected currency and include applicable taxes. We reserve the right to change prices without prior notice. Product images are illustrative and may slightly vary from the actual product.
terms.s3: By placing an order, you confirm the information provided is true and complete. We accept credit card payments. The order is only confirmed after payment approval.
terms.s4: Delivery times are estimated and start counting from payment confirmation. We offer worldwide shipping with rates calculated at checkout.
terms.s5: All content on the site, including texts, images, logos and layout, is the property of Kazoom and protected by intellectual property laws. Reproduction without prior authorization is prohibited.
terms.s6: Kazoom is not responsible for indirect damages resulting from the use of the site. We will do our best to keep the site available but do not guarantee uninterrupted access.
terms.s7: These terms are governed by the laws of the country of operation.

returns.title: Returns & Refunds Policy
returns.s1: You have up to 14 calendar days after receiving the product to request a return, with no need for justification. The product must be in its original packaging, with no signs of use.
returns.s2: If the product has a manufacturing defect, you can request an exchange or return within 30 calendar days after receipt. Send photos of the defect via WhatsApp or email to speed up the process.
returns.s3i1: Contact us by email or WhatsApp
returns.s3i2: Provide your order number and the reason for the request
returns.s3i3: Wait for shipping instructions from our team
returns.s3i4: Send the product back according to the instructions
returns.s4: After receiving and verifying the returned product, the refund will be processed within 10 business days. The amount will be refunded using the same payment method used for the purchase.
returns.s5: In case of defect or shipping error, Kazoom will cover all return shipping costs. In case of withdrawal, return shipping is the customer's responsibility.
returns.s6: Customized or made-to-order products are not eligible for withdrawal-based returns. Items with signs of use, misuse, or without original packaging may have the return refused.
